titles.title: The Dove Flew into My Heart

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I may be sick but I'll keep on believing I know that I'll be healed in Jesus name The devil tried to rob me from my inheritance And the blessing the Lord has promised I looked at my lying vanities and said I'm going to walk into my victory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The dove flew into my heart I know that He did He has led me through the storms I firmly believe The Lord has raised me up so high To believe what He has done for me I'm an eagle to soar above the troubled waters He has fluttered His wings in my heart The dove flew into my heart I firmly believe The dove flew into my heart I know that He did

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I may be troubled, confused and shattered I may be scarred but I'll never give up He has promised deliverance from all my bondage He wouldn't deny what He has promised Jesus has provided all my needs Whenever I call on His name
